channel.title: programming on Pranjal Pokharel | Blog Site
channel.description: Recent content in programming on Pranjal Pokharel | Blog Site

item.title: Learning Bash Scripting
item.description: While I have been using Linux for over 2 years now, frankly I had never thought about automating tasks using simple bash scripts. This means that while I did not know about bash scripting from a syntactical point of view, I was very comfortable using the command line and it’s various commands. And so my journey misadventures with bash scripting started with an idea, as always. 1) Idea! Need to switch to light theme on vim…wait!
